tweets.name: Michael Seibel
tweets.text: It’s hard to understand why someone would choose to be obviously immoral.  But when you understand they don’t see themselves that way, everything makes sense again.

tweets.name: Michael Seibel
tweets.text: Your motivation shapes your ethics.  When you pursue your deepest desires your brain has a way of convincing itself that you are acting morally.

tweets.name: Michael Seibel
tweets.text: People are hard to understand when you don’t know what motivates them.  Once you learn what motivates a person - you can fairly accurately predict their behaviors.
